DATABENTO_DATASETS.role: Historical dataset discovery, availability conditions, range, schemas, and cost APIs.

DATABENTO_FUTURES.role: Parent symbology, contract expirations, definitions, and unadjusted futures conventions.

DATABENTO_SYMBOLOGY.role: Historical symbol preservation and supported parent symbology for GLBX, IFUS, and XCBF.

DATABENTO_STATISTICS.role: Official settlement and open-interest statistics distinct from OHLCV.

DATABENTO_PRICING.role: Usage-based historical pricing, free credits, and dataset-dependent redistribution terms.

CME_DATAMINE.role: Exchange-native audit source for historical settlements and reference data.

CME_REFERENCE_DATA.role: Authoritative lifecycle dates and contract specifications.

CBOE_HISTORICAL.role: Exchange-native historical VX settlement, volume, and open-interest audit source.

ICE_REPORT_CENTER.role: Exchange-native end-of-day, settlement, volume, open-interest, and instrument reports.
